name: TJX Rewards® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 10% off first purchase with the TJX Rewards Credit Card

earning_rates.category: T.J. Maxx, Marshalls, HomeGoods, Sierra, and Homesense
earning_rates.notes: 5% back in rewards at T.J. Maxx, Marshalls, HomeGoods, Sierra, and Homesense stores

other_benefits.name: Exclusive cardholder perks
other_benefits.description: Early access to sales and special promotions for cardholders

notes: Store-only card accepted at T.J. Maxx, Marshalls, HomeGoods, Sierra, and Homesense. 5% back is solid for bargain shoppers. Cannot be used outside TJX family of stores. Separate from TJX Rewards Platinum Mastercard which can be used anywhere.
